project.title: GCN5 interactome in U87MG Control, IR and doxorubicin treated conditions
project.projectDescription: GCN5 interactome in U87MG Control, IR and doxorubicin treated conditions
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: For mass spectrometry, 1.5 mg protein lysates of untreated, irradiated, doxorubicin treated U87MG were taken for immunoprecipitation with 10 µg GCN5 and Rabbit isotype control antibodies. In-solution digestion and in-gel digestion were performed. In case of in-solution digestion, 400 µl of 6M Urea were added to the immunoprecipitates and incubated at 37º Celsius for 1 hour. The beads were then centrifuged at 4000 rpm for 5 minutes at 4ºC. The supernatant was taken, followed by addition of 1 ml acetone to it and incubation at -20ºC overnight. The next day, post centrifugation at 12000 rpm for 15 minutes, the pellets were air dried for 5 minutes, followed by resuspension in 20 µl TEAB buffer. Next, 80 µl DTT (Final concentration:5 mM) was added, incubated at 60º C 1 hour followed by 50 µl IAA (Final concentration: 20 mM) incubation for 10 minutes at room temperature in the dark. The proteins were then incubated with 20 µl trypsin overnight. The next day, the samples were kept for drying in speed vacuum for 4-6 hours. For in-gel digestion, the immunoprecipitates were resuspended in Laemmli and loaded on 8% SDS gel. Visualization was done by staining using Coomassie Brilliant blue followed by destaining. The bands which were present in GCN5 pulldown and not in isotype control pulldown were precisely cut using sterile scalpel. Next, the bands were washed with 100 µl of 50 mM Ammonium Bicarbonate and 100% Acetonitrile in 1:1 ratio. The samples were then vacuum dried for 15 minutes. Next, 200 µl of 10mM DTT and 50 mM NH4CO3 was added in 1:1 ratio and incubated at 55ºC for 45 minutes. This was followed by addition of 55 mM IAA in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate and incubation for 30 minutes at room temperature. Next, the gel particles were washed thrice with 200 µl 50mM NH4CO3 and Acetonitrile (1:1) for 15 minutes. Then, the gel particles resuspended in acetonitrile were vacuum dried for 15 minutes .10-15 µl of Trypsin (10 ng/ml) was added and incubated at 37 degrees overnight. The next day, 100 µl of 0.1% TFA was added, vortexed for 15 minutes and supernatant was collected. 100 µl of 0.1% TFA in 50% Acetonitrile was added, vortexed and supernatants collected twice. The supernatant was next vacuum dried to obtain dried peptides. The dried peptides processed by in-solution or in-gel digestion were then resuspended in 20 µl of 0.1% formic acid and washed through C-18 columns equilibrated with 80% Acetonitrile. The samples were finally eluted in 60 µl acetonitrile thrice in fresh Eppendorf, followed by air drying and resuspension in 20 µl 0.1% Formic Acid.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Liquid chromatography mass spectrometry (LC-MS-MS) Orbitrap detector with resolution 60000, m/z scan range 375-1700, maximum injection time 50 ms was performed for 1 hour and the protein search was performed against Homo sapiens database (downloaded from Uniprot) using Proteome Discoverer 2.2 at High-Resolution mass-spectrometry based Proteomics Research and Training Facility, Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), Bombay, India.
